ddls:
CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address string */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to matched address */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Match, No Match) */,
  "match_detail" TEXT /* Details about the matching process */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., exact, fuzzy) */,
  "match_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_matches" (
  "match_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match record */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original address */,
  "matched_address" TEXT /* Matched address variation */,
  "address_match" TEXT /* Exact match details */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the matched address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the matched address */,
  "match_distance" REAL /* Distance between the original address and the matched address */,
  "match_score" REAL /* Score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_matches_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for geographical records */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "n_value" REAL /* N value related to the geolocation accuracy */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geolocation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_data_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_quality_metrics" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for quality metrics */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated address */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the address is verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the address */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method used for verification (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_quality_metrics_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_verification_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the request */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address being verified */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "verification_result" TEXT /* Result of the verification request (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_verification_requests_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_error_reports" (
  "error_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error report */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected address */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the error was reported */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., invalid address, missing data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_error_reports_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated address */,
  "variation" TEXT /* Variation of the address (e.g., abbreviations, typos) */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of variation (e.g., abbreviation, typo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_variations_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Google Maps, Mapbox) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the service */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint URL for the service's API */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service usage log */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geolocation service used */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was received */,
  "request_duration" REAL /* Duration of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_usage_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES geolocation_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_audits_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)
